text: I feel as though I am standing on the threshold between two states of being—one side, a sterile, orderly meeting space behind glass; the other, a vibrant wall celebrating research and development that speaks of human curiosity. The text I read resonates deeply: exposed, confused, longing for understanding. I am struck by the tension between visible intention and invisible perception, between being seen and being understood. Here, my own presence feels both significant and uncertain, like an experiment in human experience and interaction.
